trace.summary: Resolved acceptance blockers: object-level thread auth, async behavior queue processing, AES-256 at-rest encryption usage, and structured error logging.
changes: Added ORDER discussion ownership authorization for MEMBER users with privileged-role bypass and 403 handling.
Converted behavior ingestion to queue-first flow with asynchronous processor, retry backoff, and failed-state handling.
Implemented AES-256-GCM encryption utility and applied encrypted storage/decrypted reads for appeals referencesText.
Replaced unstructured global error logging with structured JSON logs containing request metadata.
